title: Simple opinions with creo and me parece
subtitle: Say what you think.
overview: Creo que and pienso que are safe A2 opinion frames.
Me parece means it seems to me.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I do not think it is easy.

items.es: Creo que esta lección es útil.
items.en: I think this lesson is useful.
I think we need more practice.
It seems like a good idea to me.

items.es: No creo que sea muy caro.
items.en: I do not think it is very expensive.

items.es: Creo que hablar cada día ayuda mucho.
items.en: I think speaking every day helps a lot.
